base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of maggie — a character from 1991 the simpsons arcade game. Maggie (pacifier-baby) — held by Homer + Marge tag-team super. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Maggie (pacifier-baby) — held by Homer + Marge tag-team super; stolen by thugs to trigger story
